description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a test job using the gliderlabs/herokuish:latest Docker image with a postgres:latest service. Define a POSTGRES_DB variable set to test and a stage named test. The test job should run only on branches and tags, but be skipped when the variable TEST_DISABLED is set. In the script, add a conditional that sets DB_HOST to 'postgres' if KUBERNETES_PORT is unset otherwise to 'localhost', then export DATABASE_URL using POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, DB_HOST, and POSTGRES_DB, copy the repository to /tmp/app, and finally run /bin/herokuish buildpack test. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
